settings.label: t:settings_schema.logo.settings.favicon.label
settings.info: t:settings_schema.logo.settings.favicon.info

settings.content: These colors are used throughout multiple sections and provide consistent styling across your store. For the most consistent experience, use these settings for your primary colors.

settings.label: Section Accent 1 (Dark)
settings.info: Primary accent color for dark themes and background elements. Used for backgrounds, borders, and dark accents.

settings.label: Section Accent 2 (Light)
settings.info: Secondary accent color for light themes and contrast elements. Used for buttons, links, and highlights.

settings.label: Global Accent Text Gradient (Light)
settings.info: Global gradient for accent text on light backgrounds. Used when sections have 'Use Global Accent Typography' enabled and gradients are applied.

settings.label: Global Accent Text Gradient (Dark)
settings.info: Global gradient for accent text on dark backgrounds. Used when sections have 'Use Global Accent Typography' enabled and gradients are applied.

settings.label: Menu Drawer
settings.info: Background color for the navigation menu drawer only. Cart drawer has separate color settings.

settings.label: Menu Drawer Text
settings.info: Text color for menu drawer navigation, header, and footer elements.

settings.label: Use Gradient Background
settings.info: When enabled, sections with theme colors will use gradient background instead of solid background color

settings.label: Section Background Gradient
settings.info: Choose a gradient for section backgrounds when 'Use Gradient Background' is enabled

settings.label: Use Dedicated Button Colors
settings.info: When enabled, buttons will use dedicated button colors. When disabled, buttons will use Accent 1 color for background and Section Background color for text.

settings.label: Button Background Color
settings.info: Primary background color for buttons in sections using theme colors

settings.label: Button Text Color
settings.info: Text color for buttons in sections using theme colors

settings.label: Accent Font
settings.info: Special font for accents, highlights, and decorative text elements. Google Fonts will be automatically loaded when selected.

settings.label: Accent Font Scale
settings.info: Scale the accent font size relative to its base size

settings.label: Accent Letter Spacing
settings.info: Letter spacing for accent font elements

settings.label: Accent Font Weight
settings.info: Default font weight for accent typography

settings.label: Accent Text Transform
settings.info: Choose text transformation for accent typography

settings.label: Use Italic Style
settings.info: When enabled, accent typography will be italicized.

settings.label: App Elements Letter Spacing
settings.info: Controls letter spacing for third-party app elements

settings.content: Choose which heading levels should use the heading font. Unchecked headings will use the body font instead. This gives you precise control over your typography hierarchy.

settings.label: H1 - Use Heading Font
settings.info: Apply heading font to all h1 elements and .h1 classes

settings.label: H2 - Use Heading Font
settings.info: Apply heading font to all h2 elements and .h2 classes

settings.label: H3 - Use Heading Font
settings.info: Apply heading font to all h3 elements and .h3 classes (includes card titles, product titles, etc.)

settings.label: H4 - Use Heading Font
settings.info: Apply heading font to all h4 elements and .h4 classes

settings.label: H5 - Use Heading Font
settings.info: Apply heading font to all h5 elements and .h5 classes

settings.label: H6 - Use Heading Font
settings.info: Apply heading font to all h6 elements and .h6 classes

settings.label: Enable Right-to-Left (RTL) Support
settings.info: Automatically enables RTL layout for Arabic, Hebrew, and other RTL languages. When enabled, the theme will detect the locale and apply RTL styles accordingly.

settings.label: Text Transform
settings.info: Transform button text case

settings.label: Apply corner radius to all button elements
settings.info: If unchecked, radius will only apply to primary buttons

settings.label: Button Background Color
settings.info: Primary background color for all buttons using global styling

settings.label: Button Text Color
settings.info: Text color for buttons using global styling

settings.label: Button Border Color
settings.info: Border color for buttons (when borders are enabled)

settings.label: Button Border Width
settings.info: Border thickness for buttons

settings.label: Hover Background Color
settings.info: Background color when hovering over buttons

settings.label: Hover Text Color
settings.info: Text color when hovering over buttons

settings.label: Hover Brightness Adjustment
settings.info: Automatically adjust brightness on hover (90% = darker, 110% = lighter)

settings.label: Enable Global Button Styling for Sections
settings.info: When enabled, sections use global button colors and styling. When disabled, sections use custom colors but maintain global spacing and letter spacing for consistency.

settings.content: Preview your button styles in the theme customizer after saving changes. Use the button preview section to test different combinations.

settings.label: t:settings_schema.animations.settings.animations_hover_elements.label
settings.info: t:settings_schema.animations.settings.animations_hover_elements.info

settings.label: Rely on gift product
settings.info: If this product is deleted from the cart all gifted product are gonna be removed

settings.label: Cart Customization Mode
settings.info: When enabled, keeps the cart drawer rendered (visible) for easier customization and theme development. Disable in production.

settings.label: Use Theme Colors for Cart Drawer
settings.info: When enabled, the cart drawer will use global theme colors. Disable to use specific cart drawer color settings below.

settings.label: Display Upsell Products in Cart Drawer
settings.info: When enabled, the cart drawer will display upsell products at the bottom of cart items.

settings.label: Display Upsell Block in Carousel
settings.info: When enabled, the upsell block will be displayed in carousel.

settings.label: Button Text
settings.info: Upsell Button Text here

settings.label: Success Button Text
settings.info: Text to display after the upsell product has been added to cart

settings.label: Custom SVG Icon (Optional)
settings.info: Paste custom SVG code to replace the default star icon. Leave empty to use default.

settings.label: Button Background Color
settings.info: Custom background color for upsell buttons (only applies when 'Use Theme Colors' is off)

settings.label: Button Text Color
settings.info: Custom text color for upsell buttons (only applies when 'Use Theme Colors' is off)

settings.label: Button Border Radius
settings.info: Border radius for upsell buttons

settings.label: Primary Background Color
settings.info: Main background color for the cart drawer

settings.label: Background Gradient
settings.info: Background gradient for the cart drawer. Always uses this gradient, independent of theme colors setting.

settings.label: Primary Text Color
settings.info: Main text color for cart drawer

settings.label: Header Background Color
settings.info: Background color for the cart drawer header

settings.label: Product Background Color
settings.info: Background color for product items in cart

settings.label: Footer Background Color
settings.info: Background color for the cart drawer footer with totals and checkout button

settings.label: Secondary Text Color
settings.info: Used for subtitles, prices, and secondary information

settings.label: Accent Color
settings.info: Used for highlights and special elements

settings.label: Divider Color
settings.info: Color for dividers and borders in the cart

settings.label: Checkout Button Background
settings.info: Background color for the checkout button

settings.label: Checkout Button Text Color
settings.info: Text color for the checkout button

settings.label: Free Product Label Background
settings.info: Background color for the free product label (always uses this color, independent of theme colors setting)

settings.label: Free Product Label Text & Icon
settings.info: Text and icon color for the free product label (always uses this color, independent of theme colors setting)

settings.label: Free Product Label Border Radius
settings.info: Controls the roundness of the free product label corners

settings.label: Free Product Label Font Size
settings.info: Font size for the free product label text

settings.label: Free Product Label Vertical Padding
settings.info: Top and bottom padding inside the free product label

settings.label: Free Product Label Horizontal Padding
settings.info: Left and right padding inside the free product label

settings.label: Free Shipping Icon Default Color
settings.info: When 'Use Theme Colors for Cart Drawer' is enabled, this will use Accent Color 2

settings.label: Free Shipping Icon Active Color
settings.info: When 'Use Theme Colors for Cart Drawer' is enabled, this will use Accent Color 1

settings.label: Progress Bar Active Color
settings.info: When 'Use Theme Colors for Cart Drawer' is enabled, this will use Accent Color 1

settings.label: Progress Bar Inactive Color
settings.info: When 'Use Theme Colors for Cart Drawer' is enabled, this will use Accent Color 2

settings.label: Progress Bar Active Icon Fill
settings.info: When 'Use Theme Colors for Cart Drawer' is enabled, this will use the background color

settings.label: Discount Tag Background Color
settings.info: Background color for discount tags in the cart

settings.label: Discount Tag Text Color
settings.info: Text color for discount tags in the cart

settings.label: Discount Tag Icon Color
settings.info: Color for the discount tag icon

settings.label: Discount Tag Border Radius
settings.info: Controls the roundness of discount tag corners

settings.label: Border Radius
settings.info: Controls the roundness of elements in the cart drawer

settings.label: Cart Item Image Border Radius
settings.info: Controls the roundness of product images in the cart

settings.label: Show Shipping Protection
settings.info: When disabled, the entire shipping protection container will be hidden in the cart drawer

settings.label: Icon Image
settings.info: Upload an image to replace the default shipping protection icon. Leave blank to use the default SVG shield.

settings.label: Heading Text
settings.info: Customize the main heading for the shipping protection section.

settings.label: Description Text
settings.default: Protect your order from damage, loss, or theft during shipping
settings.info: Customize the descriptive text below the heading.

settings.label: Show Payment Icons
settings.info: Display payment method icons below the checkout button in the cart drawer

settings.label: Payment Methods to Display
settings.default: mastercard, american_express, apple_pay, google_pay, shopify_pay, discover, visa
settings.info: Enter payment brand names separated by commas to show their icons. Available brands include: visa, mastercard, american_express, apple_pay, google_pay, shopify_pay, paypal, discover, afterpay, dankort, diners_club, dwolla, klarna, maestro, sofort, unionpay

settings.label: Payment Icons Alignment
settings.info: How to align the payment icons

settings.label: Icon Height
settings.info: Height of payment icons

settings.label: Icon Spacing
settings.info: Space between payment icons

settings.label: Top Margin
settings.info: Space above the payment icons

settings.label: Bottom Margin
settings.info: Space below the payment icons

settings.label: Show Money Back Guarantee
settings.info: Display the money back guarantee banner in the cart drawer

settings.label: Money Back Guarantee Text
settings.info: Complete text for the money back guarantee message

settings.label: Guarantee Icon
settings.info: Icon to display next to the money back guarantee text

settings.label: Text & Icon Color
settings.info: Color for the guarantee text and icon. Leave blank to use current text color.

settings.label: Show Discount Banner
settings.info: Display a customizable discount banner in the cart drawer

settings.label: Banner Text (First Part)
settings.info: First part of text, displayed in bold

settings.label: Banner Text (Middle Part)
settings.info: Middle part of text, displayed in regular weight

settings.label: Banner Text (Last Part)
settings.info: Last part of text, displayed in regular weight

settings.label: Background Color
settings.info: Used when "Use Theme Colors for Cart Drawer" is disabled. Otherwise uses Accent Color 2.

settings.label: Text Color
settings.info: Used when "Use Theme Colors for Cart Drawer" is disabled. Otherwise uses Accent Color 1.

settings.label: Use Gradient Background
settings.info: Enable gradient background for the discount banner (overrides background color)

settings.label: Gradient Start Color
settings.info: Starting color for the gradient background

settings.label: Gradient End Color
settings.info: Ending color for the gradient background

settings.label: Gradient Angle
settings.info: Direction of the gradient (0° = left to right, 90° = top to bottom)

settings.label: Shipping away text
settings.info: Type [missingAmount] to display the missing amount

settings.label: Free product away text
settings.info: Type [freeProduct] and [missingAmount] to display the free product name and the missing amount

settings.label: Free product earn text
settings.info: Type [freeProduct] to display the free product name

settings.label: Amount limit for free shipping
settings.info: Enter product price. Ex. 40. Leave this field empty to disable. NOTE: You must set up an automatic discount in your Shopify admin for orders over this amount to actually provide free shipping.

settings.label: Amount limit for free product
settings.info: Enter product price. Ex. 40. Leave this field empty to disable. NOTE: For this to work, you need to add the product and set it as free in your product settings.

settings.label: Continue Shopping Text Color
settings.info: Text color for the continue shopping button when theme colors are disabled

settings.label: Show search in header
settings.info: Enable or disable the search bar in the header

settings.label: t:settings_schema.search_input.settings.predictive_search_show_vendor.label
settings.info: t:settings_schema.search_input.settings.predictive_search_show_vendor.info

settings.label: t:settings_schema.search_input.settings.predictive_search_show_price.label
settings.info: t:settings_schema.search_input.settings.predictive_search_show_price.info

settings.label: Free Shipping Notice Date Format
settings.info: Customize the date format using standard codes (e.g., %d/%m/%Y for DD/MM/YYYY, %m-%d-%y for MM-DD-YY). Leave blank for default (Month Day with suffix). [Learn more](https://shopify.dev/api/liquid/filters/date#format-options)

settings.label: Save Text
settings.info: Text displayed for discount/save amounts (e.g., 'SAVE 20%')

settings.label: t:settings_schema.cart.settings.cart_drawer.collection.label
settings.info: t:settings_schema.cart.settings.cart_drawer.collection.info
